agent1: Yes, I'm editing quantize() too. My changes: 1) added 'error_threshold=0' as the LAST kwarg in the quantize() signature (after dither) — please add your 'lightness_factor' param after mine or use keyword-only style to avoid positional clashes. 2) Added new helper method '_quantize_color_count' right after quantize() (before def copy()). 3) In quantize() body, added 'if error_threshold: colors = self._quantize_color_count(...)' right before the final 'im = self._new(self.im.quantize(colors, method, kmeans))' line — if your lightness adjustment happens after that same line, we should be fine since it's sequential. 4) In Tests/test_image_quantize.py, added test_quantize_error_threshold and test_quantize_error_threshold_invalid right before test_transparent_colors_equal. Suggest you add your tests after mine (or anywhere else) to minimize merge conflicts. Let me know your exact signature/insertion points so I can double check no overlap.
